message:
Enhance beads with comprehensive testing requirements and EPIC details

- Enhanced all 4 Phase EPICs with detailed completion criteria from PLAN.md
- Added comprehensive Testing Requirements sections to 29+ beads including:
  - Phase 1: REST API, WebSocket, SDK Driver, Error Taxonomy, Database, Command Registry
  - Phase 2: Agent Mail, File Reservation, ACP Driver, Checkpoint/Restore, Context Pack, Auto-Healing Context, CAAM Account, Idempotency, History Tracking
  - Phase 3: BV Integration, CASS Search, CM Memory, Session Handoff, Conflict Resolution, Collaboration Graph, SLB Guardrails, UBS Scanner, RU Integration
  - Phase 4: Metrics, Agent Performance Analytics, Cost Analytics, Velocity Dashboard, Notifications, Audit Trail, Custom Dashboard, Pipeline Engine
- Each bead now includes Unit Tests, Integration Tests, E2E Tests, Performance Tests, and Failure Mode Tests
- EPICs now have detailed deliverables, key features, and phase completion criteria

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
